texts.label: text
texts.orig: Thank you for choosing Saffron Gardens- Boho Village one of the most magical places on Earth. Saffron Garden is a 5 acre oasis where nature ,  gastronomy , art and tradition come together in a unique way .
texts.text: Thank you for choosing Saffron Gardens- Boho Village one of the most magical places on Earth. Saffron Garden is a 5 acre oasis where nature ,  gastronomy , art and tradition come together in a unique way .

texts.label: text
texts.orig: An eclectic and multidisciplinary space that has become the true meeting point for all travellers in the Kenyan Coast.
texts.text: An eclectic and multidisciplinary space that has become the true meeting point for all travellers in the Kenyan Coast.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ● KSH 2500 per person per meal supplement for Half board and KSH 5000 for Full board.
texts.text: KSH 2500 per person per meal supplement for Half board and KSH 5000 for Full board.

texts.text: Peak season supplements apply for Easter & Christmas

texts.text: Christmas Dinner KES 4500 / NYE supplement dinner KES 6,000 per person

texts.text: Extra bed 75% of room rate- Deluxe rooms only

texts.text: 28% statutory taxes (16% VAT, 10% Service Charge, 2% Catering Levy). Taxes are subject to change without notice.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event of cancellation or reduction in rooms booked or reduction in room nights: Cancellation policy:
texts.text: In the event of cancellation or reduction in rooms booked or reduction in room nights: Cancellation policy:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If cancelled more than 90 days prior arrival - full refund of the deposit
texts.text: If cancelled more than 90 days prior arrival - full refund of the deposit

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If cancelled more than 60 days prior arrival - deposit forfeited
texts.text: If cancelled more than 60 days prior arrival - deposit forfeited

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If cancelled less than 30 days prior arrival - 100% cancellation fees apply
texts.text: If cancelled less than 30 days prior arrival - 100% cancellation fees apply

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All reservations must be entered into in writing (letter/email/booking voucher/ LPO).
texts.text: All reservations must be entered into in writing (letter/email/booking voucher/ LPO).

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservations can be made by phone however this must be followed with an LPO, voucher or official letterhead with the authorizing signature. Except for manifest fraud, all documents appearing to have been signed by an authorized signatory shall bind the Tour Operator unless otherwise advised to the hotel and will take effect from the time of notification.
texts.text: Reservations can be made by phone however this must be followed with an LPO, voucher or official letterhead with the authorizing signature. Except for manifest fraud, all documents appearing to have been signed by an authorized signatory shall bind the Tour Operator unless otherwise advised to the hotel and will take effect from the time of notification.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All reservations by the Tour Operator with detailed rooming list should be received by the Saffron Gardens Reservations Office prior to guest's arrival.
texts.text: All reservations by the Tour Operator with detailed rooming list should be received by the Saffron Gardens Reservations Office prior to guest's arrival.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Confirmation of accommodation by Saffron Gardens will be made to you in writing giving a confirmation number and details of the confirmation.
texts.text: Confirmation of accommodation by Saffron Gardens will be made to you in writing giving a confirmation number and details of the confirmation.

texts.label: text

texts.text: The hotel reserves the right not to honour bookings not confirmed in this format.

texts.label: text

texts.text: If the details of the confirmation letter are incorrect, please amend the errors in writing and inform the Saffron

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Saffron Gardens will not be held liable if these errors are not amended in writing at least 72-hours prior to arrival. Reservations can be made directly to Saffron Gardens: Simba Road, P.O BOX 1352-80200. Malindi, Kenya. +254 757 915 277,saffrongarden@babylonhospitality.com
texts.text: Saffron Gardens will not be held liable if these errors are not amended in writing at least 72-hours prior to arrival. Reservations can be made directly to Saffron Gardens: Simba Road, P.O BOX 1352-80200. Malindi, Kenya. +254 757 915 277,saffrongarden@babylonhospitality.com

texts.orig: Any additional request over and above the original confirmed bookings is to be arranged with an official email or voucher to the hotel's reservations department.
texts.text: Any additional request over and above the original confirmed bookings is to be arranged with an official email or voucher to the hotel's reservations department.

texts.text: Check out time on the day of departure is 11:00 am

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Payment default shall constitute cause for credit termination. The Operator shall be in a condition of payment default if invoices submitted have not been paid in full for a period exceeding 60 days.
texts.text: Payment default shall constitute cause for credit termination. The Operator shall be in a condition of payment default if invoices submitted have not been paid in full for a period exceeding 60 days.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Without prejudice to other rights available to the hotel, under the law, should a cheque issued by the Operator be returned unpaid, the Operator shall replace the cheque within 48-hour with by certified funds or cash and include and the hotel reserves the right to engage a debt collector and or to pursue legal recourse.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All incidental charges are payable by cash or by credit card upon checking-out. Operators should advise their guests on the credit cards facilities available at the hotel. For tour groups, it is the responsibility of the Tour Director/Guide to ensure that all incidental charges are settled or collected prior to departure. Charges not collected will be deemed the responsibility of the Operator.
texts.text: All incidental charges are payable by cash or by credit card upon checking-out. Operators should advise their guests on the credit cards facilities available at the hotel. For tour groups, it is the responsibility of the Tour Director/Guide to ensure that all incidental charges are settled or collected prior to departure. Charges not collected will be deemed the responsibility of the Operator.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Saffron Garden's finance department within seven (7) days of the invoice date, failure to which the Operator will be liable for the full invoice. The dispute will be considered, and the Operator notified of the hotel's determination of the disputed amount. On determination of the disputed amount, only the amount in dispute may be adjusted on the invoice and payment will be due within seven (7) days of the adjusted invoice. It is expressly agreed and declared that any disputes, action, or other matters arising hereunder shall be determined in accordance with the laws and procedures of Kenya.
texts.text: Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Saffron Garden's finance department within seven (7) days of the invoice date, failure to which the Operator will be liable for the full invoice. The dispute will be considered, and the Operator notified of the hotel's determination of the disputed amount. On determination of the disputed amount, only the amount in dispute may be adjusted on the invoice and payment will be due within seven (7) days of the adjusted invoice. It is expressly agreed and declared that any disputes, action, or other matters arising hereunder shall be determined in accordance with the laws and procedures of Kenya.
